aiPageTapChipHint: Tap a chip to test the picker.
aiLocalTranslateHint: Phrase lookup first, then word-by-word fallback. Runs on your server with 14+ languages and auto-detect.
aiTranslateHint: Translate any text into any supported language.
aiServicesSubtitle: Smart replies and multi-language translation — private, fast, and built into your chats.
aiFeatureRepliesHint: Pick a sample message and tone, generate preview replies below, then tap a chip to try them.
aiToneServicesHint: This tone applies to smart replies in all conversations.
aiTourPanelHint: Walk through every sidebar tab and learn what Chats, Calls, Groups, Services, and the rest are for.
aiTourWelcomeBody: Next we'll highlight each tab in the sidebar and explain what it does. You stay on this page — tap Next to move through the list.
aiTourNavChatsBody: Your inbox for direct messages and open conversations. Send text, media, voice notes, and use smart replies above the composer.
aiTourNavSearchBody: Find people by name or username, search message history, and start new chats from one place.
aiTourNavStatusBody: Post short photo, video, or text updates that contacts can view — similar to stories.
aiTourNavNetworkingBody: Browse community posts, discover people beyond your contacts, and connect with others.
aiTourNavGroupsBody: Create or join multi-member group chats with admins, invites, and shared media.
aiTourNavChannelsBody: Follow broadcast-style spaces where admins post updates and most members read along.
aiTourNavCallsBody: Start voice or video calls, review call history, and open shared call links.
aiTourNavAiBody: Try smart replies and server-local translation here before using them inside conversations.
aiTourNavProfileBody: Edit your display name, photo, bio, and username — and share your public profile link.
aiTourNavSettingsBody: App preferences: notifications, language, theme, navigation style, and device options.
aiTourNavPrivacyBody: Password, email, two-step verification, active sessions, privacy controls, E2E keys, and blocked users.
aiTourNavGenericBody: Open this section from the sidebar when you need it.
aiTourFinishBody: Tap any sidebar tab to jump in. Replay this tour anytime from Services → Dashboard tour.
attachImagesOnly: Only images can be attached here.
attachUnsupportedType: This file type is not supported.
shareContactHint: Pick a contact from your chats to share.
authHeroBlurb: Secure messages, groups, channels, calls, AI tools, and privacy controls in one modern workspace.
bannedUsersHint: Remove the ban to let someone join again with an invite or if you add them back.
blockedPageHint: Users you have blocked cannot message you.
blockedRedirectBody: Account security and blocked users now live under Account & security.
callBusyRemote: The other user is already in a call.
callPrivacyBlocked: This user is not accepting calls right now.
callDeclinedRemote: The other user declined the call.
callDevicesHint: Choose microphone, camera, and speaker for this call.
callInviteInvalidHint: This call link is invalid, expired, or you do not have access to it.
callInviteJoiningHint: Opening the linked conversation and preparing the call.
callInviteLoginTitle: Sign in to join the call
callInviteLoginHint: This call link is valid. Sign in to open the conversation and join.
callLinkCancelFailed: Could not cancel the call link.
callLinkCopyFailed: Could not copy the call link.
callLinkCreateFailed: Could not create the call link.
callLinksHint: Create a shareable link for a direct chat, group, or channel call.
callMissedRemote: The call ended before you answered.
callReminderSoon: Scheduled call in {{name}} is about to start.
callScheduledEmptyHint: Create a link with a future time and it will appear here.
callScheduledHint: Upcoming call links you created appear here.
callScreenShareNeedActive: Available once the call is connected
callSelectConversationError: Choose a chat before creating a call link.
callsHelpGroupHint: Calls work in group chats too.
callsHelpOpenChatHint: Pick a chat here or open one from Chats, then tap voice or video to connect instantly.
callsHelpTechBody: Voice and video calls work best on a stable internet connection. If a call fails to connect, try again or switch networks.
callsHistoryEmptyHint: Start a voice or video call from a chat and it will appear here.
callsHistoryHint: Open any row to jump back into the matching chat and call again.
callsPageSubtitle: Start voice or video calls and review your recent call history.
callsHistorySubtitle: Recent calls, missed moments, and quick ways back into the conversation.
callsTurnReadyBody: Voice and video calling is set up and ready to use.
callsTurnWarningBody: Calls may work on the same network but struggle on different networks. Try again or contact support if calls never connect.
callsStartHint: Choose a direct chat or group, then start a voice or video call immediately.
callsStartDirectHint: Starts a 1:1 voice or video call with this person.
callsStartGroupHint: Starts a group call with members in this chat.
callsQuickDialEmpty: No callable chats yet. Start a conversation first.
callsLoadFailed: Could not load call history and call links right now. Try refresh later.
channelInfoVisibilityHintPrivate: Private — only invited members can join.
channelInfoVisibilityHintPublic: Public — listed in Discover and open to join.
channelCannotPostHint: Only channel admins can post here.
channelSlugArabicHint: Use Latin letters for the slug (e.g. my-team). It is optional — we can generate one from the name.
channelManageMembersCurrentHint: Manage subscribers, roles, and removals here.
channelManageMembersHint: Add people from your direct chats only.
channelCreatePrivateHint: Private channels are hidden and only invited members can join.
channelCreatePublicHint: Public channels can be discovered and joined later. You can still invite people now.
channelLeaveAdminHint: Promote another admin first if subscribers should keep managing this channel.
channelsCreateIntro: Choose public or private, set a name, optional description and slug, then add optional starters.
channelsDiscoverIntro: Public channels you have not joined yet — tap Join to subscribe.
channelsDiscoverEmpty: No new public channels to discover.
channelsDiscoverEmptyHint: Channels you already belong to appear under Your channels. Create one below or check back later.
channelsEmptyHint: No public channels in the directory yet. Create one below or tap Refresh.
channelsPageSubtitle: Review channels you are in, browse the directory, then create one if you need a new space.
channelsYourChannelsEmpty: You are not in any channel yet. Browse Discover below, or create a new channel.
channelsYourChannelsIntro: Channels you already belong to — open to chat.
chatNoMessagesHint: Send a message to start the conversation.
chatInviteSent: Invite sent — they need to accept before you can chat
chatInviteRequired: Send a chat invite first and wait for them to accept
chatLeaveHint: You will stop receiving new messages from this chat.
chatNewDmHint: Search for someone to start a direct chat.
chatSelectConversationHint: Pick a chat from the list to continue here.
chatsMaintenanceBody: We are finishing improvements to messaging, threads, and the inbox. Chats will be back soon.
chatsMaintenanceHint: You can still browse Status and other sections while we wrap up.
chatListPageSubtitle: Open a conversation or filter by type.
chatMembersHint: Tap a member to view their profile.
chatsHiddenHint: Still a member — restore to show in main chats again.
confirmDeleteMessage: Remove this message from your devices? Others may still see it.
confirmDeleteMessages: Remove these messages from your devices? Others may still see them.
contactAddressBody: Vegasphere is operated remotely. Contact us by email for postal or legal correspondence.
contactIgnoreDone: Notifications from this person will be quieter in-app.
contactIntro: We are here to help. Reach out to us and we will get back to you soon.
contactResponseBody: We aim to reply within a few business days for account and privacy requests.
deleteForEveryoneHint: Also remove for everyone in this chat (plain messages only, within server time limit).
e2eCannotSend: Cannot send until this device unlocks the chat key (same browser that enabled encryption).
privacyE2eDisabled: Encryption turned off for this chat
e2eEnableHint: Both people need device keys. Turn on end-to-end encryption for this chat.
e2eSetupHint: End-to-end encryption is available after both people generate device keys in Privacy.
apiNetworkUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
forgotPasswordCheckInbox: Check your inbox and spam folder. The link expires in one hour.
forgotPasswordDevTokenHint: Reset code received. Tap continue or copy the code.
forwardNoOtherChats: No other chats to forward to. Start a chat from Contacts first.
globalSearchHint: Find people, chats, and messages in one place.
globalSearchNoResults: No matches for this query. Try a different name, chat title, or message keyword.
globalSearchTypeMore: Add 2+ characters (1+ for Chinese/Japanese/Korean). Works in any language — Arabic with or without tashkeel.
globalSearchWelcomeBody: Look up people, open chats, or jump to message hits — in any language.
globalSearchWelcomePeopleHint: Names, usernames, and emails across Vegasphere.
globalSearchWelcomeChatsHint: Titles and recent previews from your inbox.
globalSearchWelcomeMessagesHint: Text, file names, and topic labels in your history.
groupBanPrompt:
Ban until (optional). Leave blank for permanent ban.
Example: {{example}}
groupChannelInfoAdminOnly: Only admins can open group or channel management.
groupCreateSelectedHint: {{count}} people ready to be added after creation.
groupCreateSelectedHint_one: 1 person ready to be added after creation.
groupCreateSelectedHint_other: {{count}} people ready to be added after creation.
groupCreateSoloHint: You can create the group now and add people later.
groupMemberIdsHint: Choose members during creation or add them later.
groupsCreateIntro: Name the group, add an optional description, pick starters if you want, then create.
groupsListIntro: Tap a row to open the group chat. You can add or remove people later inside the conversation.
groupsPageSubtitle: Group chats for teams and friends. Open one below or start a new group.
groupInfoOverviewHint: Members, topics, and your role in this group.
groupTopicsManageIntro: Organize conversations with topics — members can filter the chat by topic.
landingHomeBody: A modern communication space — messaging, calls, groups, and assistive AI in a calm, luxurious interface.
landingFeaturesBody: From daily chat to group calls — built for speed and clarity without clutter.
landingFeature1Body: Text, media, replies, reactions, and disappearing messages in one calm thread.
landingFeature2Body: Team rooms, topics, member roles, and secure invite links to join.
landingFeature3Body: Crystal voice and video with clear ringing, busy, and in-call states.
landingFeature4Body: Translate, smart replies, and link previews — helpful, never noisy.
landingPrivacyBody: Every sensitive setting in one place — no vague terms, just direct control over who sees you and who reaches you.
landingPrivacy1Body: Choose who sees when you were online — everyone, contacts only, or nobody. Hide typing indicators too.
landingPrivacy2Body: Stop unwanted messages instantly. Block cuts contact; ignore hides a chat without alerting them.
landingPrivacy3Body: Tune alerts for direct chats, groups, and mentions — calm by default, loud only when it matters.
landingStartBody: Create your account in minutes — your chats, groups, and calls in one secure, elegant workspace.
landingScrollHint: Scroll horizontally across Home, Platform, Privacy Policy, and Get Started
loginHeroBody: Pick up your chats, calls, and groups exactly where you left them.
legalErrorBody: We could not load this page. Please try again or return home.
homeUnifiedIntro: Direct messages, groups, broadcast channels, voice/video calls, saved messages, status, contacts, invites, E2E options, AI suggestions, and push notifications — all in this app.
incomingCallHint: Accept to share your microphone (and camera if video).
incomingGroupCallHint: {{name}} started a {{mode}}. Accept to join with your microphone and camera permissions.
joinFailed: Could not join. You may be banned or the link expired.
joinInvalidOrExpired: This invite link is invalid or expired.
loadOlderMessagesHint: Scroll up to load older messages
locationNotSupported: Location is not supported on this device.
liveLocationPermissionError: Could not start live location. Allow location permission and try again.
liveLocationSharingHint: Live location stays active for 30 minutes or until you stop it.
liveLocationUnsupported: Live location is not supported on this device.
loginWorkspaceTagline: Access your chats, groups, calls, and workspace.
manageMembersCurrentHint: Manage current members, roles, and removals here.
manageMembersHint: Only people from your direct chats can be added.
mediaSwipeHint: Swipe or use arrow keys to browse
memberPickerContactsEmpty: No one from your chats matches that search.
memberPickerContactsHint: You can only add people you already chat with.
memberPickerContactsNoChats: Start a direct chat first — then you can add that person here.
messageEditFailed: Could not save edit (offline?). Try again.
messageSendFailed: Could not send message. Try again.
messageUploadFailed: Could not upload this attachment. Try again.
nameMinLengthError: Display name must be at least 3 characters.
signupVerifyEmailToast: Check your inbox to verify your email.
signupVerifyDevTokenHint: Verification link received. Open the link or copy the code.
forgotPasswordSuccessToast: If that email is registered, reset instructions were sent.
resetPasswordSuccessToast: Password updated. You can sign in now.
verifyEmailSuccessToast: Email verified. You can sign in now.
resetPasswordTokenRequired: Paste the reset code from your email.
noGroups: No groups yet. Create one below.
notificationsChatInviteBody: {{name}} wants to start a direct chat with you.
notificationsEmptyBody: Only important items, like invites and mentions, will stay here for later.
notificationsPageSubtitle: A quiet inbox for important items that need action or follow-up.
networkingCollabBoardHint: Open project requests from students and teammates looking for collaborators.
networkingHeadlinePlaceholder: Headline, e.g. Full-stack student building AI tools
networkingInterestsPlaceholder: Interests, separated by commas: AI, cybersecurity, startups
networkingIntroOpenProfile: «{{profile}}» on your networking profile stood out to me.
networkingIntroOpenHeadline: Your networking headline "{{text}}" caught my eye.
networkingIntroOpenSkills: Your networking skills in {{items}} stood out to me.
networkingIntroOpenInterests: Your networking interests in {{items}} caught my attention.
networkingIntroOpenLookingFor: I saw on your networking profile that you're looking for "{{text}}".
networkingIntroOpenShared: I noticed we both care about {{items}}.
networkingIntroOpenGeneric: I came across your profile on Vegasphere Networking.
networkingIntroBridgeProjectSkill1: I'm working on "{{project}}" and your {{skill}} experience looks like a great fit.
networkingIntroBridgeProjectSkill2: I'm building "{{project}}" and thought your background in {{skill}} could help.
networkingIntroBridgeProjectSkill3: My project "{{project}}" could use someone with your {{skill}} skills.
networkingIntroBridgeProjectHeadline1: I'm working on "{{project}}" and your headline matches what I need.
networkingIntroBridgeProjectHeadline2: I'm looking for a partner for "{{project}}" — your profile stood out.
networkingIntroBridgeProject1: I'm currently focused on "{{project}}" and would value your perspective.
networkingIntroBridgeProject2: I'm searching for a teammate for "{{project}}" and your profile caught my attention.
networkingIntroBridgeProject3: I'm exploring "{{project}}" and wondered if you'd be open to chatting.
networkingIntroBridgeSkillOnly: I'd love to hear more about your experience with {{skill}}.
networkingIntroBridgeGoals: Your goals and mine might align — worth a conversation.
networkingIntroClose1: Would you like to connect and exchange ideas?
networkingLookingForPlaceholder: What are you looking for? e.g. A UI teammate for graduation project
networkingMemberFallback: Active Vegasphere member ready to connect.
networkingNoMatches: No strong matches yet. Add more skills or try another tag.
networkingNoPosts: No open collaboration posts yet. Be the first to publish one.
networkingPostTitleTooShort: Title must be at least 3 characters.
networkingPostSummaryTooShort: Summary must be at least 10 characters.
networkingPostSummaryPlaceholder: Explain the project, goal, timeline, and what kind of teammate would help.
networkingProfileHint: Add skills and interests so Vegasphere can match you with useful teammates.
networkingRecommendationsHint: Ranked by shared skills, interests, mutual groups, and profile keywords.
networkingRolePlaceholder: Role needed, e.g. Frontend, UI designer, Data analyst
networkingSearchPlaceholder: Search people, skills, interests, or projects
networkingSkillsPlaceholder: Skills, separated by commas: React, Node.js, Python
networkingSubtitle: Discover teammates, project partners, and useful introductions powered by shared skills.
networkingTagsPlaceholder: Tags, separated by commas: react, ai, design
networkingClosePostConfirm: Close this collaboration request? People will no longer see it on the board.
networkingProfilePreviewHint: Avatar and name come from your main Profile tab.
networkingAlreadyConnected: You already have a direct chat — use Start chat.
notFoundBody: That link may be broken or the page was removed.
passwordUpdatedSignIn: Password updated. You can sign in.
passwordMinLengthError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
pollCreateHint: Ask the group a question and let people vote inline.
privacyChangesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the effective date when changes are material.
privacyChoicesBody: You can update profile and privacy settings in the app, manage notifications, block users, and request account deletion from Account & security.
privacyCollectBody: We collect information you provide (such as your name, email, and profile details), messages and files you send, and technical data needed to operate the service (device type, IP address, and usage logs).
privacyDeleteAccountConfirm: Delete your account permanently? This cannot be undone.
privacyDeleteAccountHint: This permanently deletes your account and messages you sent. This cannot be undone.
privacyDifferenceBody: Blocked accounts cannot message you. Ignored senders can still message you, but you won’t get notifications from them.
privacyAutoSaveHint: Privacy toggles save automatically when you change them.
privacyGroupAddPermission: Who can add me to groups
privacyIgnoredHint: You will not get notifications from these people (they are not blocked).
privacyIntro: This Privacy Policy explains what Vegasphere collects, how we use it, and the choices you have.
privacyPageHint: Password, email, privacy, devices, and account controls.
changeEmailHint: Enter a new address and your current password. You must verify the new email before it is fully active.
changeEmailSuccess: Email updated. Check your inbox to verify the new address.
emailVerificationHint: Confirm you own this address for account recovery and security alerts.
twoStepSectionHint: Adds a PIN after your password when signing in on new devices.
privacyPeopleHint: Manage who can reach you. Blocked users cannot message you; ignored users stay reachable but won't notify you.
privacyBlockedDetail: Cannot send you messages or see your activity.
privacySecurityBody: We use encryption in transit, access controls, and monitoring to protect your data. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure.
privacyShareBody: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with service providers who help us operate Vegasphere, when required by law, or with your consent.
privacySearchDiscoverable: Who can find me in search
privacyMutualHint: Turning off read receipts or typing in direct chats also hides others’ receipts and typing from you (groups still show receipts).
privacyE2eHint: Generate keys for encrypted direct messages. Keys stay on your device; only the public key is stored on the server.
privacyReportIntro: Flag abuse, spam, or harassment. Reports are reviewed by moderators.
privacyReportHint: Pick a user and describe the issue. This does not block them automatically.
privacyUseBody: We use your information to provide messaging, calls, and related features; to secure accounts; to improve the product; and to comply with legal obligations.
profileAvatarInvalidType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image.
profileAvatarTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
profileE2eHint: Needed for encrypted direct chats. Secret keys stay in this browser only.
profileE2eSynced: Encryption key saved for this browser.
profileIdentityHint: Name, username, photo, and bio shown to others.
profileSaveHint: Photo and profile fields apply when you tap Save changes.
profilePhoneHint: International format. Used for contact matching when enabled.
profilePageHint: Update how others see you in Vegasphere.
profileShareHint: Copy a link or scan the QR code so others can open your profile in Vegasphere.
profileShareCopyFailed: Could not copy the profile link.
profileShareQrAlt: QR code for your profile link
profileShareNoUsernameHint: Set a username above to make your profile easier to recognize when shared.
profileShareQrHint: Others can scan this to open your profile on their phone.
publicProfileYourselfHint: This is how others see you. Edit your details in Profile.
pushBackgroundHint: Get alerts when the app is closed. Uses a custom Vegasphere chime.
pushSoundPreviewBlocked: The browser blocked sound. Click anywhere once, then preview again.
pushTestSent: Test push sent — check your system notifications.
pushTestFailed: Could not send test push. Subscribe this device first.
pushNoSubscription: No active push subscription on this device.
pushNotConfigured: Push notifications are not enabled on the server yet.
pushNotifyWhenAway: Background notifications when app is closed
pushNotifyWhenAwayHint: When off, you will not receive notifications when the app is closed.
pushSubscribed: This device is subscribed for background push.
pushSwUnsupported: Browser does not support service worker push.
pushServiceUnavailable: Push notifications are not available in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge and allow notifications in system settings.
pushSwTimeout: Service worker did not start in time. Refresh the page and try again.
pushInsecureContext: Push notifications require a secure connection (HTTPS).
resetPasswordHint: Paste the code from your email link, then choose a new password.
scheduleMessageHint: Pick a future time to send this message later.
settingsCallIncomingAlertsHint: Show a browser notification when a call arrives while this tab is hidden.
settingsCallReminderAlertsHint: Show reminder notifications shortly before scheduled calls begin.
settingsEnterToSendHint: Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
settingsLocalDataHint: Manage drafts, queued outgoing messages, and local-only device preferences stored in this browser.
settingsNotifyDirectHint: Allow alerts for one-to-one and personal chats.
settingsNotifyGroupsHint: Allow alerts for group and channel activity when it is not a direct mention.
settingsNotifyMentionsHint: Keep alerts for @mentions in groups and channels.
settingsPageHint: Appearance, navigation, notifications, and app preferences.
settingsAppearanceHint: Choose light or dark mode for the workspace.
settingsLanguageHint: Switch interface language. Applies across the app.
settingsChatPreferencesHint: How the composer and media behave on this device.
settingsFloatingNavHint: Replace the sidebar with a compact orbit menu on desktop.
settingsFloatingNavSwitchHint: Opens the orbit picker when enabled. Stored on this device.
settingsNotificationsHint: Control alerts for messages and push.
settingsAutoSaveHint: Notification toggles save automatically when you change them.
settingsReduceMotionHint: Minimize animations for comfort and battery.
settingsSessionsHint: Review where your account is signed in and revoke devices you no longer trust.
settingsSound: Sound when a new message arrives (tab in background)
dashboardNeedSignIn: You need to sign in to open this page.
signupWorkspaceTagline: Create your account and start your modern chat space.
statusFeedEmpty: No active statuses from your chats right now.
statusFeedEmptyHint: When someone you chat with posts a status, it will appear here for about 24 hours. Open Your active status to post your own.
statusMineEmptyHint: Post a short update or photo — people you already chat with can see it for ~24 hours.
statusPageHint: Short updates from people you already share a conversation with. Posts expire after about 24 hours.
statusVisibilityBody: Your status is visible to {{count}} people you already share a chat with — and you see theirs the same way.
statusVisibilityEmpty: Start a chat with someone first — statuses only appear between people who already share a conversation.
termsAcceptableBody: You agree not to use Vegasphere for unlawful activity, harassment, spam, malware, or attempts to disrupt or reverse engineer the service.
termsAccountBody: You are responsible for your account credentials and for activity under your account. Keep your password secure and notify us of unauthorized access.
termsContentBody: You retain ownership of content you submit. You grant us a limited license to host, transmit, and display it solely to operate the service.
termsIntro: These Terms of Service govern your use of Vegasphere. By using the app, you agree to these terms.
termsLiabilityBody: Vegasphere is provided as is to the fullest extent permitted by law. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
termsTerminationBody: You may stop using Vegasphere at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or pose a security risk.
termsUseBody: Vegasphere provides messaging, groups, channels, calls, and related tools for personal and team communication subject to these terms.
voiceRecordEmpty: No audio was captured. Try recording again.
voiceRecordTooShort: Hold the mic a little longer before stopping.
voiceRecordFailed: Could not record audio. Check microphone permission and try again.
voiceRecordNotSupported: Voice recording is not supported in this browser.
voiceRecordNoMic: No microphone was found on this device.
voiceMicHint: Mic hears you — tap stop when done
voiceMicWaiting: Speak now — bar turns green when the mic hears you
voiceMicMuted: Mic is muted — unmute it in Windows sound settings or Chrome site settings
webrtcDisconnectedHint: Connection interrupted — audio or video may drop. Hang up and call again if it does not recover.
webrtcFailedHint: Connection failed. Hang up and try again.
accountSecurityHint: Verify your email and optionally require a PIN after your password at sign-in.
settingsPasswordFillBoth: Fill in both your current password and your new password.
changeEmailPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to change your email.
twoStepPinSetFirst: Set a PIN before enabling two-step sign-in.
settingsSessionsUseSignOut: Use sign out on this device for your current session.
settingsSessionsSignOutCurrentConfirm: Sign out on this device? You will need to sign in again.
settingsPasswordHint: Use at least 8 characters for your new password.
emailNotVerifiedHint: Verify your email to secure account recovery.
verifyEmailSuccess: Email verified. You can sign in now.
verifyEmailFailed: Verification link is invalid or expired.
verifyEmailMissingToken: Missing verification token in the link.
twoStepHint: Require a PIN after your password when signing in.
chatExportHint: Download a JSON copy of messages in this chat (up to 5,000).
topicsManageIntro: Organize conversations into topics. General is always available.
purgeAiChatbotHint: Remove all direct chats with the AI bot (admin maintenance).
purgeAiChatbotConfirm: Delete all AI bot conversations and messages? This cannot be undone.
profileE2eNotSet: No encryption key on server yet.
contactMatchHint: Paste phone numbers (one per line). Only hashes are sent.
contactMatchNoMatches: No matches found for those numbers.
nonFriendsHint: Start a chat or view a profile.
statusRepliedToOwner: Reply sent — {{name}} will see it on their status.
statusReplyOwnerOnlyHint: Only {{name}} sees this on their status — other viewers cannot.
apiPleaseFillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
apiUserAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
apiEmailAlreadyInUse: This email is already in use.
apiResetTokenInvalid: Enter a valid reset link and password (at least 6 characters).
apiNotAMember: You are not a member of this chat.
apiChannelAdminLeaveBlocked: Assign another channel admin before you leave.
apiGroupsChannelsOnly: This action is only for groups and channels.
apiChannelSlugTaken: This channel address is already taken.
apiBannedFromChannel: You are banned from this channel.
apiBannedFromChat: You are banned from this chat.
apiInvalidPhone: Invalid phone number. Use international format like +15551234567.
apiE2eDirectOnly: End-to-end encryption is only for direct chats.

apiConversationNeedsMember: Add at least one other member.
apiPrivateChannelAccessDenied: You do not have access to this channel.
apiStatusContentRequired: Enter text or add an image.

apiMemberNotInGroup: Member is not in this group.
apiGroupAddContactsOnly: Some people only allow group invites from existing contacts.
apiGroupAddNobody: Some people do not allow being added to groups.
apiEmailUpdatedVerify: Email updated. Verify your new address.
apiInvalidResetLink: Invalid or expired reset link. Request a new one.
